projectDescription: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot built with Streamlit that allows users to upload documents and ask questions about their content using OpenAI's GPT models.
keyFeatures: Upload and process PDF documents for question answering
RAG-based question answering using LangChain and ChromaDB
Multiple OpenAI GPT model support (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-4o)
Persistent vector store for document embeddings
publicApiSurface: load_existing_vector_store() - Load existing ChromaDB vector store
process_file(file) - Process uploaded PDF files into document chunks
add_to_vector_store(documents, vector_store) - Add documents to vector store
ask_question(model, query, vector_store) - Query the RAG system with a question
